description: Golden cases for building local HTML FEM mode-shape viewers from BDF geometry plus OP2 modal results or OP2-derived modal exports.

cases.title: Synthetic modal cache case
cases.purpose: Verify that OP2-derived modal JSON creates a manifest, per-mode shape files, and a local viewer URL.
checks: mode_count equals the synthetic export mode count
frequency range matches the synthetic modes
manifest and per-mode JSON files exist

cases.title: Mismatched mode node case
cases.purpose: Verify that the viewer build tolerates modal nodes not present in the BDF without failing workspace generation.
checks: manifest still records all modal nodes
summary exposes counts and artifact paths only

cases.title: Missing OP2 path
cases.purpose: Verify controlled failure when the requested OP2/modal export file does not exist.
checks: tool fails without creating a misleading modal manifest
